summary.intent: Build and iterate on a gossamer Electron app UI using Mantine components, with a GitHub-style dark/light theme, improved session table, chat-style session detail view, and the ability to spawn new Claude Code sessions from open items in a checkpoint summary.
summary.outcome: Fully migrated UI to Mantine, implemented dark/light mode, redesigned session table with copy-on-hover, activity indicators, breadcrumb navigation, chat transcript layout with nested tool uses, relative timestamps, checkpoint-based overview panel with actionable open items, and a working spawn endpoint that opens a new Terminal window running claude with the selected items as a prompt.

repo: gossamer project structure: Electron app at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer/app/, backend server at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer/src/, Prisma schema at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer/prisma/schema.prisma, SQLite DB at ~/.claude/hook-handler.db
Gossamer hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json invoke claude-hook-handler binary at /opt/homebrew/bin/claude-hook-handler which writes sessions/events to SQLite
The indexer at src/indexer.ts previously used deleteMany+createMany for OpenItem rows, wiping status on every re-index; fixed with upsert keyed on (checkpointSessionSummaryId, text)
Open item status must be inherited from previous checkpoint summaries by matching on text when new checkpoints are indexed
Claude Agent SDK query() calls the Anthropic API directly (events: system/assistant/result) — it does NOT spawn the claude CLI, so gossamer hooks never fire when using query() alone
Setting settingSources: ['user', 'project'] in SDK query() options causes hooks to fire and sessions to be recorded in gossamer DB
CLAUDECODE env var inherited from parent Claude Code session blocks nested SDK spawning; must delete process.env.CLAUDECODE at server startup
PostCSS required for Mantine v7 CSS variables: postcss.config.cjs with postcss-preset-mantine and postcss-simple-vars
Claude app icon extractable from /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns using iconutil -c iconset

code.finding: groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive toolGroup DisplayItems + their following Stop event into a single claudeTurn RenderItem for chat layout
CopyCell component wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolute ActionIcon for clipboard copy; activity dot uses updatedAt thresholds: <2min=green, <15min=orange, else gray
Shared TimeAgo component exports relativeTime(iso) and absoluteTime(iso) helpers; component shows relative time with tooltip on hover and click-to-copy

Fixed OpenItem indexing: now looks up prior status by matching text across same session's summaries using findMany + a Map, then uses upsert keyed on unique compound index (checkpointSessionSummaryId, text)
POST /api/sessions/spawn uses osascript to open a Terminal window running claude with the prompt; accepts openItemIds and calls prisma.openItem.updateMany to set status='in_progress' atomically
PATCH /api/open-items/:id endpoint updates status and optional subSessionId; validates status against allowed values
React context for header breadcrumbs; child pages call setCrumbs on mount and clear on unmount; Layout renders clickable crumbs with Anchor+navigate

workflow: light-dark() CSS function is the correct pattern for Mantine v7 theme-aware colors in Electron/Chromium; Mantine sets color-scheme on <html>
Mantine color variants like var(--mantine-color-gray-0) are always the lightest shade regardless of color scheme — must wrap with light-dark() for dark mode support
AppShell.Header spans full viewport width above both navbar and main content, ensuring hamburger button stays visible when sidebar is collapsed
localStorageColorSchemeManager persists color scheme preference across Electron app restarts
When using prisma db push for schema changes that add unique constraints, --accept-data-loss may be needed if existing data has duplicates

friction: Context window filled up twice during the session, requiring summarization and continuation
Claude Agent SDK query() bypasses the claude CLI entirely, so gossamer hooks don't fire — required discovery via log inspection and SDK source analysis
CLAUDECODE env var silently blocks SDK spawning with no clear error; needed diagnostic logging to discover
Indexer delete+recreate pattern for OpenItem rows was silently wiping user-set statuses on every checkpoint re-index
Open item statuses set on one checkpoint summary were lost when a new checkpoint created fresh OpenItem rows, since the new rows get new IDs and start as 'open'
updateOpenItemStatus was removed from imports during spawn consolidation but was still needed for manual dropdown status changes, causing a runtime ReferenceError
openItems type mismatch: server started returning objects with {id, text, status} but code in ClaudeTurnCard and CheckpointDetail still rendered them as strings, causing React child error
open_items: subSessionId is stored in the DB schema but never actually populated — the AppleScript spawn approach opens a terminal and returns immediately with no session ID to save back
Status inheritance across checkpoints only works for identical item text; if AI rephrases an open item in a new checkpoint, status is lost by design
The 'Work on selection in new session?' feature is macOS-only (uses osascript) despite stated goal of platform-agnostic design
CheckpointDetail.tsx was partially updated (openItems rendered as .text) but may have other hardcoded light colors not audited in this session
SessionTree.tsx was migrated to Mantine but not revisited for dark mode issues in the same sweep as SessionDetail
